questions.prompt: What is the event that initiates skeletal muscle contraction at the neuromuscular junction?

choices.A: Calcium release from the SR directly stimulates the nerve.
choices.B: ATP is pumped into the sarcoplasmic reticulum.
choices.C: Acetylcholine release triggers depolarization of the muscle fiber.
choices.D: Stores oxygen in the muscle cell.

questions.answer: Acetylcholine release triggers depolarization of the muscle fiber.

questions.prompt: What is the event that initiates skeletal muscle contraction at the neuromuscular junction?

choices.A: Calcium and ATP both matter, but relaxation depends on calcium reuptake into the SR.
choices.B: Calcium release from the SR directly stimulates the nerve.
choices.C: Acetylcholine release triggers depolarization of the muscle fiber.

questions.answer: Acetylcholine release triggers depolarization of the muscle fiber.
